title: Gap Lai Chi Bau
overview: A heartwarming family film filled with laughter for the Year of the Dragon. “Gặp Lại Chị Bầu” centers around Phuc, a young man passionate about acting who faces countless hardships. By chance, he ends up in Mrs. Le's boarding house and, together with his friends there, experiences the most memorable days of his youth.
